description: Run an OpenSCAP XCCDF profile evaluation (CIS / STIG / PCI / HIPAA) against the node's SCAP Security Guide datastream and return a COMPACT compliance result (score + per-rule pass/fail). Linux only.

profile.description: XCCDF profile id (e.g. 'cis_level1_server', or a full xccdf_org.ssgproject.content_profile_... id).

datastream.description: Path to an SSG datastream XML. Auto-detected from the OS if omitted.

oscap_path.description: Path to the oscap binary if not on PATH.
